title: Douglas D-558-II Skyrocket, first Mach 2 flight
note: Mapped to RP-1's X-Planes Mach 2 milestone; earlier sound-barrier milestones are intentionally omitted because they predate 1951.

title: Sputnik 1, first artificial satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's first satellite milestone.

title: Sputnik 1, first artificial satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's First Artificial Satellite (30 kg) heavy milestone.

title: Sputnik 2, first biological satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's First Biological Satellite (400 kg) heavy milestone.

title: Explorer 1, early scientific satellite
note: Approximate mapping for early science satellite progression.

title: Vanguard 1, first solar-powered satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's first solar-powered satellite milestone.

title: Sputnik 3, first heavy scientific satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's First Scientific Satellite (1000 kg) heavy milestone.

title: Discoverer 1, first polar-orbiting satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's first polar orbit satellite milestone.

title: Discoverer 1, first polar-orbiting satellite
note: Mapped to RP-1's First Polar Orbit Satellite (400 kg) heavy milestone.

title: Luna 1, first lunar flyby trajectory
note: Luna 1 missed the Moon and entered heliocentric orbit; useful as RP-1 lunar flyby analogue.

title: Luna 2, first lunar impact
note: Direct mapping for the RP-1 lunar impact milestone.

title: TIROS 1, first successful weather satellite
note: Approximate mapping for RP-1's atmospheric analysis satellite milestone.

title: Discoverer 13, first successful recovery of an object from orbit
note: User-provided mapping for RP-1's orbital-speed return milestone.

title: Vostok 1, first crewed orbital flight
note: Mapped to RP-1's first crewed orbit milestone.

title: Venera 1, first Venus flyby
note: User-provided mapping; Venera 1 likely flew by Venus after contact had been lost.

title: Syncom 2, first geosynchronous communications satellite
note: User-provided mapping for RP-1's geostationary test satellite milestone.

title: X-15 Flight 90, first winged flight above the Karman line
note: Mapped to RP-1's crewed X-plane Karman line milestone.

title: Mariner 4, first successful Mars flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Mars flyby milestone.

title: Gemini 6A and Gemini 7, first crewed space rendezvous
note: User-provided mapping for RP-1's rendezvous milestone.

title: Voskhod 2, first EVA
note: Mapped to RP-1's first EVA milestone.

title: Gemini 8, first docking of two spacecraft
note: Mapped to RP-1's docking milestone.

title: Luna 9, first soft landing on the Moon
note: Mapped to uncrewed lunar landing.

title: Luna 10, first lunar orbiter
note: Direct mapping for the RP-1 lunar orbit milestone.

title: Apollo 8, first crewed lunar flyby
note: User-provided mapping; dated to Apollo 8's arrival at and orbit around the Moon.

title: Apollo 8, first crewed lunar orbit
note: User-provided mapping; Apollo 8 was the first crewed mission to orbit the Moon.

title: Apollo 11, first crewed Moon landing
note: Mapped to RP-1's crewed lunar landing milestone.

title: Venera 7, first soft landing on Venus
note: Mapped to RP-1's Venus landing milestone.

title: Luna 16, first robotic lunar sample return
note: Mapped to RP-1's uncrewed lunar landing and sample return milestone; dated to Earth return.

title: Luna 17 and Lunokhod 1, first lunar rover
note: Mapped to RP-1's uncrewed lunar rover milestone.

title: Salyut 1, first space station
note: Mapped to RP-1's early space station milestone.

title: Mariner 9, first Mars orbiter
note: Mapped to RP-1's Mars orbit milestone.

title: Pioneer 10, first Jupiter flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Jupiter flyby milestone.

title: Mariner 10, first Mercury flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Mercury flyby milestone.

title: Venera 9, first Venus orbiter
note: User-provided mapping for RP-1's Venus orbit milestone.

title: Viking 1, first long-lived Mars lander
note: Mapped to RP-1's Mars landing milestone.

title: Pioneer 11, first Saturn flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Saturn flyby milestone.

title: Voyager 2, first Uranus flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Uranus flyby milestone.

title: Voyager 2, first Neptune flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Neptune flyby milestone.

title: Galileo, first Jupiter orbiter
note: User-provided mapping for RP-1's Jupiter orbit milestone.

title: Mars Pathfinder and Sojourner, first Mars rover
note: Mapped to RP-1's Mars rover milestone; dated to Sojourner's deployment from the lander.

title: Cassini, first Saturn orbiter
note: Mapped to RP-1's Saturn orbit milestone.

title: MESSENGER, first Mercury orbiter
note: Mapped to RP-1's Mercury orbit milestone.

title: Dawn, first spacecraft at Vesta
note: Mapped to RP-1's Vesta flyby milestone using Dawn's Vesta arrival/orbit as the closest historical analogue.

title: Dawn, first spacecraft at Ceres
note: User-provided mapping; Dawn's Ceres arrival/orbit is used as the closest historical analogue for the RP-1 Ceres flyby milestone.

title: New Horizons, first Pluto flyby
note: Mapped to RP-1's Pluto flyby milestone.

title: Chang'e 4, first far-side lunar landing
note: Mapped to RP-1's uncrewed far-side lunar landing milestone.
